# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| latest  | ✅ Yes    |

This is a static HTML prototype. There is no server, no database, no user accounts, and no data collection. The attack surface is limited to the static content itself.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue with this repository or the deployed site at [loca-yolk.evidtech.com](https://loca-yolk.evidtech.com):

**Contact:** devon@evident.icu
**Subject line:** `[Security] loca-yolk — brief description`
**Response time:** Within 48 hours

Please include:

- A description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce or proof-of-concept (if applicable)
- Your assessment of severity and potential impact

**Do not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities. Use the private email channel above.

## Infrastructure

This repository deploys to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions. Access is managed by:

- **Repository owner:** Ivan Solano (@ISolano7)
- **Infrastructure manager:** Devon Tyler Barber, Evident Technologies LLC (@DevonTyler)
